prompt: Rewrite: Costs rose sharply, so services were cut.
source_sentence: Costs rose sharply, so services were cut.
instruction: Rewrite with a more formal linker.
correct_answers: Costs rose sharply. Consequently, several services were cut.
accepted_answers: Costs rose sharply. Consequently, several services were cut.
Costs rose sharply. Consequently, several services were cut
